revision.text: "{{{articletitle}}}." ''{{{worktitle}}}''. URL: [{{{URL}}} {{{URLdesc}}}]

revision.comment: Changed how the URL is displayed
Changed how the URL is displayed
Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]] [[{{{year}}}]].
add , between date and year
avoid bogus boldface if "work" is empty string
Add {{{author}}}
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/OldakQuill|OldakQuill]] to last version by Curps
revert; caused an error in some articles
the period (.) is not part of the title so should be outside the quotation marks. Yes I am picky. :)
Added "Web Link" as first two words. Otherwise its not clear what kind of ref it is (books, etc are obvious)
revision.text: Web Link: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: Suddenly having my footnotes covered with "Web Link" is annoying.
revision.text: Web reference: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: URL accessed on....
version with optional parameter handling
format
Make Year optional because Date can contain full date
de-emphasizing date
reverted: my eyes are crying (sorry for beeing that bold)
testing to fix redundant date link mess - I'll revert if it doesn't work
added esoteric warning
eliminated space at end (moved <noinclude> one line up)
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] to last version by Adrian Buehlmann
Square brackets re-introduced so that user preferences work again. Spurios comma and space removed, again user prefernces take care of it.
What do you think?
rv AzaToth's changes because it displayed uppercased parameter names as defaults. Didn't examine other changes; discuss in Talk before trying something so we know what to Think about.
There is no point to wiki-linking the date in a reference. Nobody is going to be checking what historic event happened the same day you accessed a file. It creates too many red links.
rv to last SEWilco to restore date format for user preferences. See existing Talk about dates. Read warning about understanding before changing.
Ok, I sat the parameters right now, they should show lowercase now
reverted to revision as of 08:53. See talk (I would like to discuss revision 11:07 first before applying it)
reverted to my proposal, but removed unneccissary paramaters as per consensus. parameters still on 'url' because it can often include '='
ok, back with the numbers :) plus some other
back link if required params missing
line 18: indented closing "}}" by one level as this refers to "{{boolor" on line 15 (warning: cannot be seen in diff)
used new parameters "test" and "then" of {{if}} instead of "1=" and "2=" (this should have not changed the semantic of the code)
Warning: drastic change: Replaced {{if}} with new {{qif}}. I have tested that but please revert quickly if you see anything that doesn't work. Thanks!
reworked space char handling
there was one } missing
Improved date user preferences when using "date","year" variant. (Was reported by Fritz Saalfeld, see talk. See also [[User talk:Adrian Buehlmann/web reference 2005-12-02-1]])
another look
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Steve block|Steve block]] ([[User talk:Steve block|talk]]) to last version by AzaToth
cat to "Citation templates"
Removing unneeded use of [[Template:Tl]]
added HTML cite element, no ID attribute yet (see [[template talk:Web reference#HTML cite element, anchor]])
revision.text:
<cite>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
    |1={{booland
      |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
      |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}
    }}
    |2={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}}}
  |then=[[Template:Web reference|web reference]]: Parameter '''url''', '''title''' and '''date''' must be specified 
}}{{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}{{qif
  |test={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}
    |2={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
    |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}}}
  |then= [{{{URL|{{{url}}}}}} {{{Title|{{{title}}}}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|{{{Format|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{Format|{{{format}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Work|{{{work|}}}}}}
  |then= ''{{{Work|{{{work}}}}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{Publisher|{{{publisher|}}}}}}
  |then= {{{Publisher|{{{publisher}}}}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{Date|{{{date}}}}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{Year|{{{year|}}}}}}
    |then=, [[{{{Year|{{{year}}}}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: transplant {{{author}}} handling from {{cite book}}
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}</cite><noinclude>

{{esoteric}}

revision.comment: Putting usage in template
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}</cite><noinclude>
This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.

== Usage ==
 '''<nowiki>{{cite web
 | author = 
 | year = 
 | url = 
 | title = 
 | format = 
 | work = 
 | publisher = 
 | accessdate = 
 | accessyear = 
}}</nowiki>'''

=== Required parameters ===
* '''url''': URL of online item.
* '''title''': Title of online item.
* '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format.
** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used)

=== Optional parameters ===
* '''author''': Author
* '''year''': Date published.
* '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF.  HTML implied if not specified.
* '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work.
* '''publisher''': Publisher, if any.

{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: updated usage section. removed boolor call
revision.text: {{qif |test={{boolnand |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}} }} |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{authorlink|}}} |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }}]] |else={{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }} }} }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{coauthors|}}} |then=, {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{qif |test={{{year|}}} |then= ({{{year|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} |then=.}}{{qif |test={{booland |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}}}} |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }}{{qif |test={{{format|}}} |then= ({{{format|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{work|}}} |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif |test={{{publisher|}}} |then= {{{publisher}}}. }}{{qif |test={{{accessdate|}}} |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif |test={{{accessyear|}}} |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.text: {{qif |test={{boolnand |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}} }} |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{authorlink|}}} |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }}]] |else={{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }} }} }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{coauthors|}}} |then=; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{qif |test={{{year|}}} |then= ({{{year|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} |then=.}}{{qif |test={{booland |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}}}} |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }}{{qif |test={{{format|}}} |then= ({{{format|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{work|}}} |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif |test={{{publisher|}}} |then= {{{publisher}}}. }}{{qif |test={{{accessdate|}}} |then= (URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif |test={{{accessyear|}}} |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}.) }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: usage adjustment
revision.text:
{{qif |test={{boolnand |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}} }} |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{authorlink|}}} |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }}]] |else={{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }} }} }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{coauthors|}}} |then=; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{qif |test={{{year|}}} |then= ({{{year|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} |then=.}}{{qif |test={{booland |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}}}} |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }}{{qif |test={{{format|}}} |then= ({{{format|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{work|}}} |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif |test={{{publisher|}}} |then= {{{publisher}}}. }}{{qif |test={{{accessdate|}}} |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif |test={{{accessyear|}}} |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| year = 
| url = 
| title = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| accessdate = 
| accessyear = 
}}
'''Inline:''' 
{{cite web| last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Import from en.
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=<nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}

revision.comment: <code><nowiki> instead of <pre> for one liner
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{year|}}} | ({{{year|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| year =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= |year= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Added date/month like in [[template:cite book]], per talk
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: removed dead wikilink
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for the defunct "web reference" template. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: rv of punctuation change
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: reinsert [[]] to conform with instructions and common usage, reinsert "" to conform with citation standards
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | "[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]"{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: delinked "date"; our current guideline is: do not link unless following the link provides further info to the user
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | "[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]"{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: changed normal quotes to curly quotes; this is an attempt, as they could cause problems, but if we don't get complaints they are worth having
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | “[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]”{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. revision.comment: oops, of course the quotes should enclose the title only, not the whole [...] tag!

revision.comment: clarified URL text and rm "", symbols like those are used for citing news and not for common websites, see {{cite news}}
revision.text:

{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

| format =

}}

revision.comment: 日本語化
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{{author|}}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= {{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=[[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}[[{{{accessdate}}}]]にアクセス
}}</cite><noinclude>
[[Category:リンク支援テンプレート|Cite web]]
[[en:Template:Cite web]]
</noinclude>

    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{{author|}}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= {{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=[[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}[[{{{accessdate}}}]]閲覧
}}</cite><noinclude>
[[Category:リンク支援テンプレート|Cite web]]
[[en:Template:Cite web]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: ja
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
| curly =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format (N.B. Each single digit month and day must have a "0" before it, otherwise the automatic formatting of the date according to user preferences will not work). ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: [[en:template:cite web]]01:25, 29 May 2006の版を活用
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | {{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]][[{{{accessdate}}}]]閲覧 }}. }} == 使い方 == 
{{cite web
| last = 著者の姓
| first = 著者の名
| authorlink = 著者のリンク
| coauthors = 共同著作者
| date = 日付（YYYY-MM-DD）
| year = 年
| month = 月
| url =（必須）
| title =（必須）
| format = PDFの場合、PDF
| work = 大きな作品の一部の場合、作品名
| pages = ページ
| publisher = 出版社
| language = 言語
| accessdate = 閲覧月日（必須）
| accessyear = 閲覧年（必須）
| curly = 引用符の変更。空白でなければ、"タイトル."を“タイトル.”のようにする 
}}
[[Category:リンク支援テンプレート|Cite web]] [[en:Template:Cite web]]

Each single digit month and day must have a "0" before it, otherwise the automatic formatting of the date according to user preferences will not work). ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| monthday =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =

{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: 言語の前の in を取る。タイトルの後のピリを取る
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | ({{{language}}}) }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | {{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]][[{{{accessdate}}}]]閲覧 }}. }} == 使い方 == 
{{cite web
| last = 著者の姓
| first = 著者の名
| authorlink = 著者のリンク
| coauthors = 共同著作者
| date = 日付（YYYY-MM-DD）
| year = 年
| month = 月
| url =（必須）
| title =（必須）
| format = PDFの場合、PDF
| work = 大きな作品の一部の場合、作品名
| pages = ページ
| publisher = 出版社
| language = 言語
| accessdate = 閲覧月日（必須）
| accessyear = 閲覧年（必須）
| curly = 引用符の変更。空白でなければ、"タイトル"を“タイトル”のようにする 
}}
[[Category:条件文]] [[Category:リンク支援テンプレート|Cite web]] [[en:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Removing "curly" param from usage to match current state of template code (has been removed in a preceding edit)
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{cite web
| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =
| accessyear =
| author =
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year = 
| month = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| pages = 
| language = 
| archiveurl =
| archivedate =
}}

|authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= 
|language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: tt'd the single line
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{ #if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} }}{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]] }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =
| accessyear =
| author =
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year = 
| month = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| pages = 
| language = 
| archiveurl =
| archivedate =
}}
{{cite web|url= |title= |accessdate= |accessmonthday= |accessyear= |author= |last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= |language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: use templates for current time
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{ #if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} }}{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]] }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =
| accessyear =
| author =
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year = 
| month = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| pages = 
| language = 
| archiveurl =
| archivedate =
}}
{{cite web|url= |title= |accessdate= |accessmonthday= |accessyear= |author= |last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= |language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{CURRENTMONTH}}-{{CURRENTDAY2}}''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}, and year when item was accessed, e.g. {{CURRENTYEAR}}. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Finish the CURRENTwhatever job
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{ #if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} }}{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]] }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. | author =

| first =

| coauthors = 
| date =

| month = 
| format =

| publisher = 
| pages =

| archivedate =
}}

revision.comment: Reverted to last by CyberSkull. Please don't add variables that change on a daily base to this high use load template. While it might technically not be a problem, there is no need for this risk.
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{ #if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} }}{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]] }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia.
