  |Year={{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
          |{{#if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{work|}}}
  |At = {{#if:{{{page|}}}|{{{page}}}|{{#if:{{{pages|}}|{{{pages|}}}|{{{at|}}} }} }}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#if:{{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|{{Citation error|no {{para|title}} specified|cite web}}}}|{{Citation error|no {{para|url}} specified|cite web}}}}

  |AccessDate={{#if:{{{accessdate|}}}|{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}|{{{accessdate}}} {{{accessyear}}}|{{{accessdate}}}}}|{{
    #if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}|{{{accessdaymonth}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|{{
      #if:{{{accessmonthday|}}}|{{{accessmonthday}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|
      {{{accessday|}}} {{{accessmonth|}}} {{{accessyear|}}}
      }}
    }}
   }}
  |DateFormat={{#if:{{{dateformat|}}}|{{{dateformat}}}|none}}
  |quote = {{{quote|}}}
  |Ref={{{ref|}}}
  |Sep = {{#if:{{{separator|{{{seperator|}}}}}}
          | {{#ifeq:{{{separator|{{{seperator}}}}}}|;|;|{{{separator|{{{seperator}}} }}} }}
          |.}}
  |PS={{#if:{{{quote|}}}||{{{postscript|.}}}}}
  |OriginalURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |ArchiveDate= {{{archivedate|}}}
}}{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}|[[Category:Cite web templates using unusual accessdate parameters|{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template}}

</noinclude>

''{{{work}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | . {{#if: {{{location|}}} | {{{location}}}: }} {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | （{{{date}}}） | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | （{{{month}}} {{{year}}}） | （{{{year}}}） }} }} }} }}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} | [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}]. }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | {{{archivedate}}} 時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ。 }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}|| }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | {{年月日|year={{{accessyear}}}}}{{{accessdate}}} | {{{accessdate}}}}} 閲覧。 | [[Template:Cite web]]の呼び出しエラー：引数 '''accessdate''' は必須です。{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:テンプレート呼び出しエラーのあるページ/Template:Cite web]]}} }}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} |  “{{{quote}}}” }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Add "p" and "pp" to pages parameter.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Citation/core
  |Citation class=web
  |Surname1 = {{#if:{{{last|}}}
                |{{{last}}}
                |{{#if:{{{last1|}}}
                   |{{{last1}}}
                   |{{{author|}}} 
                 }}
              }}
  |Surname2 = {{#if:{{{last2|}}}|{{{last2}}}|{{{coauthors|}}}}}
  |Surname3 = {{{last3|}}}
  |Surname4 = {{{last4|}}}
  |Surname5 = {{{last5|}}}
  |Surname6 = {{{last6|}}}
  |Surname7 = {{{last7|}}}
  |Surname8 = {{{last8|}}}
  |Surname9 = {{{last9|}}}
  |Given1 = {{#if:{{{first|}}}|{{{first}}}|{{{first1|}}}}}
  |Given2 = {{{first2|}}}
  |Given3 = {{{first3|}}}
  |Given4 = {{{first4|}}}
  |Given5 = {{{first5|}}}
  |Given6 = {{{first6|}}}
  |Given7 = {{{first7|}}}
  |Given8 = {{{first8|}}}
  |Given9 = {{{first9|}}}
  |Authorlink1 = {{#if:{{{authorlink|}}}|{{{authorlink}}}|{{{authorlink1|}}}}}
  |Authorlink2 = {{{authorlink2|}}}
  |Authorlink3 = {{{authorlink3|}}}
  |Authorlink4 = {{{authorlink4|}}}
  |Authorlink5 = {{{authorlink5|}}}
  |Authorlink6 = {{{authorlink6|}}}
  |Authorlink7 = {{{authorlink7|}}}
  |Authorlink8 = {{{authorlink8|}}}
  |Authorlink9 = {{{authorlink9|}}}
  |Year={{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
          |{{#if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{work|}}}
  |TransTitle={{{trans_title|}}}
  |At = {{#if:{{{page|}}}|p. {{{page}}}|{{#if:{{{pages|}}}|pp. {{{pages|}}}|{{{at|}}} }} }}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#if:{{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|
{{#if:{{{trans_title|}}}||
{{Citation error|no {{para|title}} specified|cite web}}}}|{{Citation error|no {{para|url}} specified|cite web}}}}}}
  |IncludedWorkURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |PublicationPlace = {{{location|}}}
  |Publisher = {{{publisher|}}}
  |language = {{{language|}}}
  |format = {{{format|}}}
  |DOI={{{doi|{{{DOI|}}}}}}
  |AccessDate={{#if:{{{accessdate|}}}|{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}|{{{accessdate}}} {{{accessyear}}}|{{{accessdate}}}}}|{{
    #if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}|{{{accessdaymonth}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|{{
      #if:{{{accessmonthday|}}}|{{{accessmonthday}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|
      {{{accessday|}}} {{{accessmonth|}}} {{{accessyear|}}}
      }}
    }}
   }}
  |DateFormat={{#if:{{{dateformat|}}}|{{{dateformat}}}|none}}
  |quote = {{{quote|}}}
  |Ref={{{ref|}}}
  |Sep = {{#ifeq:{{{separator|{{{seperator}}} }}}|;|;|{{{separator|{{{seperator|.}}} }}} }}
  |PS={{#if:{{{quote|}}}||{{{postscript|.}}}}}
  |OriginalURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |ArchiveDate= {{{archivedate|}}}
}}{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}|[[Category:Cite web templates using unusual accessdate parameters|{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  ||{{#if: {{{date|}}}

}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}
    | {{年月日| year={{{accessyear}}} }}{{{accessdate}}}{{
      #if: {{Checkdate|{{padleft:|4|{{{accessyear}}}}}-{{{accessdate}}}}}
      |
      | {{Cite web/checkyear | year={{{accessyear}}} | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
    }}
    | {{Cite web/showdate|{{{accessdate}}}}}{{
      #iferror: {{#time: Y-m | {{{accessdate}}} }}
      | {{#if: {{Checkdate|{{{accessdate}}}}}
        |
        | {{Cite web/checkdate | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
      }}
      |{{ #ifeq:{{padleft:|8|{{{accessdate|}}}}}|{{padleft:|8|{{{accessdate|}}}X}}<!-- ここの改行回避を外すと異常が発生
     -->|<!-- {{#time}}でエラーにならなくとも May yyyy 以上の長さをOKとする -->
        | {{Cite web/checkdate | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
      }}
    }}
  }}閲覧。
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if:{{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}|}}</onlyinclude></includeonly>
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 参照: [[Template‐ノート:Cite web#Template:ISOdate について]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><onlyinclude><cite style="font-style:normal">{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date}}}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      |  ({{#if: {{{month|}}}
        | {{{month}}} 
      }}{{{year}}})
    }}
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}：
}}“{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
  | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}]
  |{{#if: {{{format|}}}
    |{{#switch: {{{format|}}}
    |PDF = {{PDFlink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |DOC = {{DOClink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |#default = [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] ({{{format}}})
  }}
  |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
  }}
}}”{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  |  ({{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}<!--{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}-->
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{
     #if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date}}}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      |  ({{#if: {{{month|}}}
        | {{{month}}} 
      }}{{{year}}})
    }}
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archivedate|}}}}}時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}
    | {{年月日| year={{{accessyear}}} }}{{{accessdate}}}{{
      #if: {{Checkdate|{{padleft:|4|{{{accessyear}}}}}-{{{accessdate}}}}}
      |
      | {{Cite web/checkyear | year={{{accessyear}}} | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
    }}
    | {{Citation/showdate|{{{accessdate}}}}}{{
      #iferror: {{#time: Y-m | {{{accessdate}}} }}
      | {{#if: {{Checkdate|{{{accessdate}}}}}
        |
        | {{Cite web/checkdate | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
      }}
      |{{ #ifeq:{{padleft:|8|{{{accessdate|}}}}}|{{padleft:|8|{{{accessdate|}}}X}}<!-- ここの改行回避を外すと異常が発生
     -->|<!-- {{#time}}でエラーにならなくとも May yyyy 以上の長さをOKとする -->
        | {{Cite web/checkdate | date={{{accessdate}}} }}
      }}
    }}
  }}閲覧。
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if:{{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}|}}</onlyinclude></includeonly>
{{Documentation}}

    |

revision.text:
<includeonly><onlyinclude><cite style="font-style:normal">{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}：
}}“{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
  | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}]
  |{{#if: {{{format|}}}
    |{{#switch: {{{format|}}}
    |PDF = {{PDFlink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |DOC = {{DOClink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |#default = [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] ({{{format}}})
  }}
  |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
  }}
}}”{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  |  ({{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}<!--{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}-->
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{
     #if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archivedate|}}}}}時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}
    | {{Accessdate|accessyear={{{accessyear}}}|accessdate={{{accessdate}}}}}
    | {{Accessdate|1={{{accessdate}}}|isodate={{ISO dateJA1|1={{{accessdate}}}|defaultdate={{{accessdate}}}}}}}
  }}
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if:{{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}|}}</onlyinclude></includeonly>

revision.comment: [[:Template:Citation/core]]（2012年3月21日 (水) 07:58版UTC）よりRef部を導入し、変数を修正
revision.text:
<includeonly><onlyinclude><cite style="font-style:normal" 
{{
  #switch:{{{ref|}}}
  ||none =
  |#default = id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref}}}}}"
  |harv = {{#if:{{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{publisher|}}}
    |id="CITEREF{{anchorencode:{{{last|{{{author|{{{publisher|}}}}}}}}}{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}}}"
  }}
}}>{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}：
}}“{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
  | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}]
  |{{#if: {{{format|}}}
    |{{#switch: {{{format|}}}
    |PDF = {{PDFlink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |DOC = {{DOClink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |#default = [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] ({{{format}}})
  }}
  |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
  }}
}}”{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  |  ({{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}<!--{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}-->
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{
     #if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archivedate|}}}}}時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}
    | {{Accessdate|accessyear={{{accessyear}}}|accessdate={{{accessdate}}}}}
    | {{Accessdate|1={{{accessdate}}}|isodate={{ISO dateJA1|1={{{accessdate}}}|defaultdate={{{accessdate}}}}}}}
  }}
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if:{{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}|}}</onlyinclude></includeonly>
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 参照: [[Template‐ノート:Cite web#英語版ではすでに廃止されているパラメータに記入されたままの日付]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><onlyinclude><cite style="font-style:normal" 
{{
  #switch:{{{ref|}}}
  ||none =
  |#default = id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref}}}}}"
  |harv = {{#if:{{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{publisher|}}}
    |id="CITEREF{{anchorencode:{{{last|{{{author|{{{publisher|}}}}}}}}}{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}}}"
  }}
}}>{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}：
}}“{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
  | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}]
  |{{#if: {{{format|}}}
    |{{#switch: {{{format|}}}
    |PDF = {{PDFlink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |DOC = {{DOClink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |#default = [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] ({{{format}}})
  }}
  |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
  }}
}}”{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  |  ({{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}<!--{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}-->
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{
     #if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archivedate|}}}}}時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}
    | {{Accessdate|accessyear={{{accessyear}}}|accessdate={{{accessdate}}}}}
    | {{Accessdate|1={{{accessdate}}}|isodate={{ISO dateJA1|1={{{accessdate}}}|defaultdate={{{accessdate}}}}}}}
  }}
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if:{{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}|}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}{{{accessday|}}}{{{accessmonth|}}}<!-- {{{accessyear|}}} -->{{{day|}}}{{{access-date|}}}{{{dateformat|}}}{{{accessed|}}}|{{Citation/showdateError|accessyear={{{accessyear|}}}}}|}}<!--
--></onlyinclude></includeonly>

<includeonly><onlyinclude><cite style="font-style:normal" 
{{
  #switch:{{{ref|}}}
  ||none =
  |#default = id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref}}}}}"
  |harv = {{#if:{{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{publisher|}}}
    |id="CITEREF{{anchorencode:{{{last|{{{author|{{{publisher|}}}}}}}}}{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}}}"
  }}
}}>{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}: 
}}“{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
  | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}]
  |{{#if: {{{format|}}}
    |{{#switch: {{{format|}}}
    |PDF = {{PDFlink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |DOC = {{DOClink|1=[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]}}
    |#default = [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] ({{{format}}})
  }}
  |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
  }}
}}”{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  | {{#if:{{{trans_title|}}} |  [{{{trans_title}}}] | {{#if:{{{trans-title|}}} |  [{{{trans-title}}}]}}}}  ({{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}<!--{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}-->
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{
     #if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archivedate|}}}}}時点の[{{{url}}} オリジナル]{{#if: {{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}
    | {{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|archiveurl={{{archiveurl|}}}}}
    |
  }}よりアーカイブ。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}{{{access-date|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}
    |
    | 
    |
  }}{{Accessdate|1={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}}|isodate={{ISO dateJA|1={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}}|defaultdate={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} }} }}
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}
    | {{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|archiveurl={{{archiveurl|}}}}}
    |
  }}
}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}{{{accessday|}}}{{{accessmonth|}}}{{{accessyear|}}}{{{day|}}}{{{dateformat|}}}{{{accessed|}}}|{{Citation/showdateError|accessyear={{{accessyear|}}}|dateformat={{{dateformat|}}}}}|}}<!--
--></onlyinclude></includeonly>

* 構成：恒川省三、小笠原英樹、本郷 実、シマダ秀樹 * ナレーター：小島一慶、山本太郎、冨永みーな、熊谷ニーナ、服部 潤、佐藤賢治、大塚明夫 * 映像協力：イースト * テーマ音楽：東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ * エンディング曲：あいのくに/長谷川都 * 取材 * VE：佐藤 修、磯山正人、三宅里奈 * カメラ：望月浩二郎、中島 純、田中治夫、山本久男 * 技術：山森伸浩 * VE：奥村秀樹 * カメラ：榛沢栄一 * 照明：床井弘一 * 音声：加藤克行 * 音効：大野友造 * 美術プロデューサー：相野道生 * 美術デザイナー：西條 実 * 美術制作：笠松和明 * 装置：谷平真二 * 電飾：西田和正 * メカシステム：濱口利行 * ロケ美術：金子修一 * 装飾：後藤千鶴 * 特殊美術：白鳥保夫 * ヘアメイク：佐々木彩 * 操演：岩本浩二 * バーチャルCG：岩屋朝仁 * 編集：宮下仁 * MA：右田安昌 * 選曲：水崎雅雄 * タイトル：FIREWORKS * CG：前田紀子 * TK：長谷川道子 * 宣伝：大下慎太郎 * イラスト：佐藤美代子 * リサーチ：前森かおる * AP：会 有利 * AD：黒澤 寛 * ディレクター：大木一史、小山由晴、黒江達也 * 演出：小橋 卓、佐藤栄記、酒井祐輔、樋江井彰敏、宮下賢治、近藤 靖 * 総合演出：保津章二 * プロデューサー：川口直美、西岡浩太郎 * 制作プロデューサー：笠原 啓、戸田郁夫 * 監督：羽仁 進 * 制作：TBSテレビ、TBSエンタテインメント、TBSライブ * 製作著作：TBS

* 構成：恒川省三、小笠原英樹、本郷 実、シマダ秀樹 * ナレーター：小島一慶、山本太郎、冨永みーな、熊谷ニーナ、服部 潤、佐藤賢治、大塚明夫 * 映像協力：イースト * テーマ音楽：東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ * エンディング曲：あいのくに/長谷川都 * 取材 * VE：佐藤 修、磯山正人、三宅里奈 * カメラ：望月浩二郎、中島 純、田中治夫、山本久男 * 技術：山森伸浩 * VE：奥村秀樹 * カメラ：榛沢栄一 * 照明：床井弘一 * 音声：加藤克行 * 音効：大野友造 * 美術プロデューサー：相野道生 * 美術デザイナー：西條 実 * 美術制作：笠松和明 * 装置：谷平真二 * 電飾：西田和正 * メカシステム：濱口利行 * ロケ美術：金子修一 * 装飾：後藤千鶴 * 特殊美術：白鳥保夫 * ヘアメイク：佐々木彩 * 操演：岩本浩二 * バーチャルCG：岩屋朝仁 * 編集：宮下 仁 * MA：右田安昌 * 選曲：水崎雅雄 * タイトル：FIREWORKS * CG：前田紀子 * TK：長谷川道子 * 宣伝：大下慎太郎 * イラスト：佐藤美代子 * リサーチ：前森かおる * AP：会 有利 * AD：黒澤 寛 * ディレクター：大木一史、小山由晴、黒江達也 * 演出：小橋 卓、佐藤栄記、酒井祐輔、樋江井彰敏、宮下賢治、近藤 靖 * 総合演出：保津章二 * プロデューサー：川口直美、西岡浩太郎 * 制作プロデューサー：笠原 啓、戸田郁夫 * 監督：羽仁 進 * 制作：TBSテレビ、TBSエンタテインメント、TBSライブ * 製作著作：TBS

  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate|deadlinkdate={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}}

}}</cite>{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}
    | {{リンク切れ|date={{{deadlink|{{{deadlinkdate|}}}}}}|archiveurl={{{archiveurl|}}}}}
    |
  }}
}}<!--

revision.comment: Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Web reference]] to [[Template:Template:Cite web]]: histmerge
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;">{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
      |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}
    }}
  |then=[[Template:Web reference|Web reference]] error: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}{{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}{{qif
  |test={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}
    |2={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
    |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}}}
  |then= [{{{URL|{{{url}}}}}} {{{Title|{{{title}}}}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|{{{Format|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{Format|{{{format}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Work|{{{work|}}}}}}
  |then= ''{{{Work|{{{work}}}}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{Publisher|{{{publisher|}}}}}}
  |then= {{{Publisher|{{{publisher}}}}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{Date|{{{date}}}}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{Year|{{{year|}}}}}}
    |then=, [[{{{Year|{{{year}}}}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

{{#switch:{{{ref|}}}
  ||none =
  |#default = id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref}}}}}"
  |harv = {{#if:{{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{publisher|}}}
    |id="CITEREF{{anchorencode:{{{last|{{{author|{{{publisher|}}}}}}}}}{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}}}"
  }}
}}>{{
  #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | 1 }} }}
  |
  | {{Cite web/error|url|url={{{url|}}}|title={{{title|}}}}}
}}{{
  #ifexpr: {{#if: {{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}} | 1 | 0 }} != {{#if: {{{archive-date|{{{archivedate|}}}}}} | 1 | 0 }}
  | {{Cite web/error|archive}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|{{{author-link|}}}}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink|{{{author-link}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}
    | <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}}
  }}{{ #if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}. 
}}{{#if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}: 
}}“[{{#switch:{{{url-status|}}}|live={{ifempty|{{{url}}}|{{{archive-url|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}|dead|unfit|#default={{ifempty|{{{archive-url|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url}}}}}}} {{{title}}}]”{{#if: {{{format|}}}| ({{{format}}})
}}{{#if:{{{trans-title|}}}
  |  [{{{trans-title}}}]
}}{{#switch:{{{language|}}}
  |<!-- 空白値 -->|ja|ja-jp|ja-JP|日本語 = 
  |#default =  ({{#ifeq: {{ISO639言語名|{{{language}}}}}||{{{language}}}|{{ISO639言語名|{{{language}}}}}}})
}}{{#if: {{{website|}}}
  | . ''{{{website}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | .  {{#if: {{{location|}}}
    | {{{location}}}: 
  }} {{{publisher}}}
}}{{#if: {{{page|}}}
  |. p. {{{page}}}
   |{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
     |. pp. {{{pages}}}
   }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  |
  |{{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}
    |  ({{Citation/showdate|{{{date|}}}|{{{year|}}}|{{{month|}}}}})
    |
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[デジタルオブジェクト識別子|doi]]:[https://doi.org/{{urlencode:{{{doi}}}}} {{#tag:nowiki|{{{doi}}}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{hdl|}}} 
  |  {{Hdl|{{{hdl|}}}}}.
}}{{#if: {{{archive-date|{{{archivedate|}}}}}}{{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}
  |  {{Citation/showdate|{{{archive-date|{{{archivedate|}}}}}}}}時点の{{#switch:{{{url-status|}}}|unfit=オリジナルよりアーカイブ|live=オリジナルより[{{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}} アーカイブ]|dead|#default=[{{{url}}} オリジナル]よりアーカイブ}}。
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}{{{access-date|}}}
  | {{#if:{{{archive-date|{{{archivedate|}}}}}}{{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}
    |
    | 
  }}{{Accessdate|1={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}}|isodate={{ISO dateJA|1={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}}|defaultdate={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} }} }}
  | {{Cite web/error|accessdate}}
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</cite>{{#if: {{{archive-date|{{{archivedate|}}}}}}{{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}
  |
  |{{#switch:{{{url-status|}}}|live=|unfit|dead={{リンク切れ|date={{{url-status-date|}}}|archiveurl={{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}}}|#default={{#if:{{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}|{{リンク切れ|date={{{url-status-date|}}}|archiveurl={{{archive-url|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}}}}}}
  }}
}}</includeonly>{{#if:{{{deadlink|}}}{{{deadlinkdate|}}}|[[Category:廃止されたパラメータ|deadlink]]}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- カテゴリはここではなく、/doc サブページに追加してください -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:31:20 on [[Template:Cite web]]
revision.text: "{{{articletitle}}}." ''{{{worktitle}}}''. URL: [{{{URL}}} {{{URLdesc}}}]

revision.comment: Changed how the URL is displayed
Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]] [[{{{year}}}]].
add , between date and year
avoid bogus boldface if "work" is empty string
Add {{{author}}}
the period (.) is not part of the title so should be outside the quotation marks. Yes I am picky. :)
Added "Web Link" as first two words. Otherwise its not clear what kind of ref it is (books, etc are obvious)
revision.text: Web Link: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: Suddenly having my footnotes covered with "Web Link" is annoying.
revision.text: Web reference: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: URL accessed on....
version with optional parameter handling
format
Make Year optional because Date can contain full date
de-emphasizing date
testing to fix redundant date link mess - I'll revert if it doesn't work
added esoteric warning
eliminated space at end (moved <noinclude> one line up)
Square brackets re-introduced so that user preferences work again. Spurios comma and space removed, again user prefernces take care of it.
What do you think?
Ok, I sat the parameters right now, they should show lowercase now
reverted to my proposal, but removed unneccissary paramaters as per consensus. parameters still on 'url' because it can often include '='
ok, back with the numbers :) plus some other
back link if required params missing
line 18: indented closing "}}" by one level as this refers to "{{boolor" on line 15 (warning: cannot be seen in diff)
used new parameters "test" and "then" of {{if}} instead of "1=" and "2=" (this should have not changed the semantic of the code)
Warning: drastic change: Replaced {{if}} with new {{qif}}. I have tested that but please revert quickly if you see anything that doesn't work. Thanks!
reworked space char handling
there was one } missing
Improved date user preferences when using "date","year" variant. (Was reported by Fritz Saalfeld, see talk. See also [[User talk:Adrian Buehlmann/web reference 2005-12-02-1]])
another look
cat to "Citation templates"
Removing unneeded use of [[Template:Tl]]
added HTML cite element, no ID attribute yet (see [[template talk:Web reference#HTML cite element, anchor]])
revision.text:
<cite>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
    |1={{booland
      |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
      |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}
    }}
    |2={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}}}
  |then=[[Template:Web reference|web reference]]: Parameter '''url''', '''title''' and '''date''' must be specified 
}}{{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}{{qif
  |test={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}
    |2={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
    |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}}}
  |then= [{{{URL|{{{url}}}}}} {{{Title|{{{title}}}}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|{{{Format|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{Format|{{{format}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Work|{{{work|}}}}}}
  |then= ''{{{Work|{{{work}}}}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{Publisher|{{{publisher|}}}}}}
  |then= {{{Publisher|{{{publisher}}}}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{Date|{{{date}}}}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{Year|{{{year|}}}}}}
    |then=, [[{{{Year|{{{year}}}}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.text:
<cite>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
      |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}
    }}
  |then=[[Template:Web reference|Web reference]] error: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}{{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}{{qif
  |test={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}
    |2={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
    |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}}}
  |then= [{{{URL|{{{url}}}}}} {{{Title|{{{title}}}}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|{{{Format|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{Format|{{{format}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Work|{{{work|}}}}}}
  |then= ''{{{Work|{{{work}}}}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{Publisher|{{{publisher|}}}}}}
  |then= {{{Publisher|{{{publisher}}}}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{Date|{{{date}}}}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{Year|{{{year|}}}}}}
    |then=, [[{{{Year|{{{year}}}}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: transplant {{{author}}} handling from {{cite book}}
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})

  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif

}}{{qif

revision.comment: Putting usage in template
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}</cite><noinclude>
This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.

== Usage ==
 '''<nowiki>{{cite web
 | author = 
 | year = 
 | url = 
 | title = 
 | format = 
 | work = 
 | publisher = 
 | accessdate = 
 | accessyear = 
}}</nowiki>'''

=== Required parameters ===
* '''url''': URL of online item.
* '''title''': Title of online item.
* '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format.
** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used)

=== Optional parameters ===
* '''author''': Author
* '''year''': Date published.
* '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF.  HTML implied if not specified.
* '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work.
* '''publisher''': Publisher, if any.

{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: updated usage section. removed boolor call
revision.text: {{qif |test={{boolnand |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}} }} |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{authorlink|}}} |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }}]] |else={{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }} }} }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{coauthors|}}} |then=, {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{qif |test={{{year|}}} |then= ({{{year|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} |then=.}}{{qif |test={{booland |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}}}} |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }}{{qif |test={{{format|}}} |then= ({{{format|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{work|}}} |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif |test={{{publisher|}}} |then= {{{publisher}}}. }}{{qif |test={{{accessdate|}}} |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif |test={{{accessyear|}}} |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

(Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{year|}}} | ({{{year|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | ''{{{pages}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessdate}}}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , {{{accessyear}}} }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | pages = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''pages''': Pages, if any. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: usage adjustment
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{year|}}} | ({{{year|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| year =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Added date/month like in [[template:cite book]], per talk
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: removed dead wikilink
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template is a simpler replacement for the defunct "web reference" template. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Readded link. Not that I would encourage to used it anymore, but [[template:web reference]] is not dead. It is deprecated
revision.text:

''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: reinsert [[]] to conform with instructions and common usage, reinsert "" to conform with citation standards
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | "[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]"{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

(Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: date at new place only if {{{last|}}} is empty
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}|| {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | : |}}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}

HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: document curly option
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
| curly =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

| last =

HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: added note for a mistake I repeatedly make
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
| curly =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format (N.B. Each single digit month and day must have a "0" before it, otherwise the automatic formatting of the date according to user preferences will not work). ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: linking {{{date}}} as this must be specified in ISO format anyway (per the doc)
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =

| work =
| pages =
| publisher =

| curly =
}}

Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. revision.comment: Added accessmonthday parameter. See talk page. Old articles will not be broken.
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| monthday =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =

Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Removing "curly" param from usage to match current state of template code (has been removed in a preceding edit)
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]
