{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =
| accessyear =
| author =
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year = 
| month = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| pages = 
| language = 
}}

|authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= 
|language= }}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage ==

}}

|authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= 
|language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}}
=== Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. {{cite web|url= |title= |accessdate= |accessmonthday= |accessyear= |author= |last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= |language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{CURRENTMONTH}}-{{CURRENTDAY2}}''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}, and year when item was accessed, e.g. {{CURRENTYEAR}}. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{CURRENTMONTH}}-{{CURRENTDAY2}}''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{CURRENTMONTH}}-{{CURRENTDAY2}}''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Tweak to fix problem reported by KarlBunker (see talk)
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{ #if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}} }}{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]] }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =
| accessyear =
| author =
| last = 
| first = 
| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year = 
| month = 
| format = 
| work = 
| publisher = 
| pages = 
| language = 
| archiveurl =
| archivedate =
}}
{{cite web|url= |title= |accessdate= |accessmonthday= |accessyear= |author= |last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= |date= |year= |month= |format= |work= |publisher= |pages= |language= |archiveurl= |archivedate=}} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, e.g. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''archiveurl''': URL of the archive location of the item (requires '''archivedate''') * '''archivedate''': Date when the item was archived (requires '''archiveurl'''), in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite news]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage ==

| url = 
| title = 
| accessdate = 
| accessmonthday =

| author =
| last =

| authorlink = 
| coauthors = 
| date = 
| year =

Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, preferably in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. revision.comment: rm per talk page request
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{
#if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}}
  ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified
}}{{
#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} 
  | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}}
    ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted
}}
}}</includeonly>{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}|
    {{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  |}}
}}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}
  | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
    | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
    | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
}}{{#if: {{{language|}}} |  (in {{{language}}}) 
}}.{{#if: {{{format|}}}
  |  ({{{format|}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  |  ''{{{work}}}''.
}}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
  |  pp. {{{pages}}}
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  |  ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | .
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  ||{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}}).
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}).
        |  ({{{year}}}).
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]]
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  |  Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}.
}}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}}
  |  Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
__NOTOC__
__NOEDITSECTION__
This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for web sites which are not news sources. This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.

See the [[Template talk:Cite web|talk page]] for documentation on how to use this template.

{{esoteric}}

==See also==
* [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide
* [[Wikipedia:Citation templates]]: Related templates
* [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]]
* [[Template:Cite news]]
* [[Template:Cite book]]

</noinclude>

  | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}}
    ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted
}}
}}</includeonly>{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}|
    {{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  |}}
}}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}
  | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
    | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
    | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
}}{{#if: {{{language|}}} |  (in {{{language}}}) 
}}.{{#if: {{{format|}}}
  |  ({{{format|}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  |  ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
  |  pp. {{{pages}}}.
  | .
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  |  ''{{{publisher}}}''{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | .
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  ||{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}}).
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}).
        |  ({{{year}}}).
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]]
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  |  Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}.
}}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}}
  |  Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>

    ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''archiveurl''' and '''archivedate''' must be both specified or both omitted
}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}|
    {{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  |}}
}}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}
  | . }}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
    | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
    | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
}}{{#if: {{{language|}}} |  (in {{{language}}}) 
}}{{#if: {{{format|}}}
  |  ({{{format|}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
  |  pp. {{{pages}}}
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | . {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  ||{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{{date}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  Archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]].
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  |  Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}.
}}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}}
  |  Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}.
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Hprotected}}{{esoteric}}
See the [[Template talk:Cite web|talk page]] for documentation on how to use this template.

revision.comment: consistancy with citation, cit journaland cite news in markup fro language parameter
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{
#if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}}
  ||You must specify  '''''title = ''''' and '''''url = ''''' when using {{[[Template:cite web|cite web]]}}.
{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:Articles with broken citations]]}}
}}{{
#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}{{{archivedate|}}} 
  | {{#if: {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}| {{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} |1}}}}
    ||You must specify '''''archiveurl = ''''' and '''''archivedate = ''''' when using {{[[Template:cite web|cite web]]}}.
{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:Articles with broken citations]]}}
}}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
    | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}]]
    | {{#if: {{{last|}}}
      | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}
      | {{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}|
    {{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{#ifeq:{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{date}}}}}|{{{date}}}|[[{{{date}}}]]|{{{date}}}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  |}}
}}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}
  | . }}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  |  {{{editor}}}: 
}}{{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}}
    | {{#if: {{{archiveurl|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{archiveurl}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
    | {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] }}}}
}}{{#if: {{{format|}}} |  ({{{format|}}})
}}{{#if:{{{language|}}} 
  |  (in {{{language}}})
}}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
  | . ''{{{work}}}''
}}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
  |  {{{pages}}}
}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
  | . {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | 
    | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }}
  }}
}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
  ||{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |  ({{#ifeq:{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{date}}}}}|{{{date}}}|[[{{{date}}}]]|{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{date}}}}}|1970-01-01|[[{{{date}}}]]|{{{date}}}}}}})
    | {{#if: {{{year|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{month|}}}
        |  ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
        |  ({{{year}}})
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}.{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}}
  |  Archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on [[{{{archivedate}}}]].
}}{{#if: {{{doi|}}} 
  |  [[Digital object identifier|DOI]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}].
}}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}
  |  Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}.
}}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}}
  |  Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , {{{accessyear}}} }}.
}}{{#if: {{{accessdaymonth|}}}
  |  Retrieved on {{{accessdaymonth}}}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} |  {{{accessyear}}} }}.
}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} 
  |  “{{{quote}}}”
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{Documentation}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: editprotected request on talk page
WOAH! who nearly made a 300,000-transclusion template unprotected?!? Thank god for Cenarium :-D
you cannot use parameter defaults when people are going to leave parameters blank but defined
remove alternative parameter names that were not supported in original code, per talk
remove newly-added parameters that seem to have little or no use for web citations
restore accessdaymonth/monthday/year parameters
Restroing to 12/27 version which seems to have worked
Per talk. Take changes slowly

''{{{work}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | . {{#if: {{{location|}}} | {{{location}}}: }} {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} || }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }} }}.{{#if: {{{archivedate|}}} | Archived from [{{{url}}} the original] on {{{archivedate}}}. }}{{#if: {{{doi|}}} | [[Digital object identifier|doi]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi|{{{doilabel|}}}}}} {{{doi}}}]. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , {{{accessyear}}} }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessmonthday}}}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , {{{accessyear}}} }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdaymonth|}}} | Retrieved on {{{accessdaymonth}}}{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | {{{accessyear}}} }}. }}{{#if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}" }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: update to citation/core version after testing and discussion on talk
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template sandbox notice}}</noinclude>{{Citation/core
  |Citation class=web
  |Surname1 = {{#if:{{{last|}}}
                |{{{last}}}
                |{{#if:{{{last1|}}}
                   |{{{last1}}}
                   |{{{author|}}} 
                 }}
              }}
  |Surname2 = {{#if:{{{last2|}}}|{{{last2}}}|{{{coauthors|}}}}}
  |Surname3 = {{{last3|}}}
  |Surname4 = {{{last4|}}}
  |Surname5 = {{{last5|}}}
  |Surname6 = {{{last6|}}}
  |Surname7 = {{{last7|}}}
  |Surname8 = {{{last8|}}}
  |Surname9 = {{{last9|}}}
  |Given1 = {{#if:{{{first|}}}|{{{first}}}|{{{first1|}}}}}
  |Given2 = {{{first2|}}}
  |Given3 = {{{first3|}}}
  |Given4 = {{{first4|}}}
  |Given5 = {{{first5|}}}
  |Given6 = {{{first6|}}}
  |Given7 = {{{first7|}}}
  |Given8 = {{{first8|}}}
  |Given9 = {{{first9|}}}
  |Authorlink1 = {{#if:{{{authorlink|}}}|{{{authorlink}}}|{{{authorlink1|}}}}}
  |Authorlink2 = {{{authorlink2|}}}
  |Authorlink3 = {{{authorlink3|}}}
  |Authorlink4 = {{{authorlink4|}}}
  |Authorlink5 = {{{authorlink5|}}}
  |Authorlink6 = {{{authorlink6|}}}
  |Authorlink7 = {{{authorlink7|}}}
  |Authorlink8 = {{{authorlink8|}}}
  |Authorlink9 = {{{authorlink9|}}}
  |Year={{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
          |{{#if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{work|}}}
  |At = {{#if:{{{page|}}}|{{{page}}}|{{{pages|}}}}}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#if:{{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No {{para|title}} specified{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:Articles with broken citations]]}}}}|You must specify {{para|url}} when using {{tl|cite web}}{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:Articles with broken citations]]}}}}
  |IncludedWorkURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |Place = {{{location|}}}
  |Publisher = {{{publisher|}}}
  |language = {{{language|}}}
  |format = {{{format|}}}
  |DOI={{{doi|{{{DOI|}}}}}}
  |AccessDate={{#if:{{{accessdate|}}}|{{{accessdate|}}}|{{{accessday|}}} {{{accessmonth|}}} {{{accessyear|}}}}}
  |DateFormat={{#if:{{{dateformat|}}}|{{{dateformat}}}|none}}
  |quote = {{{quote|}}}
  |Ref={{{ref|}}}
  |Sep = {{{separator|{{{seperator|.}}}}}}
  |PS={{#if:{{{quote|}}}||.}}
  |Archive = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|Archived from {{#if:{{{url|}}}|[{{{url|}}} the original]|the original}} {{#if:{{{archivedate|}}}| on {{{archivedate}}}|. You must specify the date the archive was made using the {{para|archivedate}} parameter.{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}}|| [[Category:Articles with broken citations]]}}}}
             }}
}}<noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |Citation class=web

                |{{{last}}}
                |{{#if:{{{last1|}}}
                   |{{{last1}}}
                   |{{{author|}}} 
                 }}
              }}
  |Surname2 = {{#if:{{{last2|}}}|{{{last2}}}|{{{coauthors|}}}}}
  |Surname3 = {{{last3|}}}
  |Surname4 = {{{last4|}}}

  |Given2 = {{{first2|}}}
  |Given3 = {{{first3|}}}
  |Given4 = {{{first4|}}}
  |Given5 = {{{first5|}}}
  |Given6 = {{{first6|}}}
  |Given7 = {{{first7|}}}
  |Given8 = {{{first8|}}}
  |Given9 = {{{first9|}}}
  |Authorlink1 = {{#if:{{{authorlink|}}}|{{{authorlink}}}|{{{authorlink1|}}}}}
  |Authorlink2 = {{{authorlink2|}}}

  |Authorlink4 = {{{authorlink4|}}}
  |Authorlink5 = {{{authorlink5|}}}
  |Authorlink6 = {{{authorlink6|}}}
  |Authorlink7 = {{{authorlink7|}}}
  |Authorlink8 = {{{authorlink8|}}}
  |Authorlink9 = {{{authorlink9|}}}
  |Year={{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
          |{{#if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{#if:{{{year|}}}|{{{year}}}|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{work|}}}
  |At = {{#if:{{{page|}}}|{{{page}}}|{{#if:{{{pages|}}|{{{pages|}}}|{{{at|}}} }} }}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#if:{{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|{{Citation error|no {{para|title}} specified|cite web}}}}|{{Citation error|no {{para|url}} specified|cite web}}}}
  |IncludedWorkURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |PublicationPlace = {{{location|}}}
  |Publisher = {{{publisher|}}}
  |language = {{{language|}}}
  |format = {{{format|}}}
  |DOI={{{doi|{{{DOI|}}}}}}
  |AccessDate={{#if:{{{accessdate|}}}|{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}}|{{{accessdate}}} {{{accessyear}}}|{{{accessdate}}}}}|{{
    #if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}|{{{accessdaymonth}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|{{
      #if:{{{accessmonthday|}}}|{{{accessmonthday}}} {{{accessyear|}}}|
      {{{accessday|}}} {{{accessmonth|}}} {{{accessyear|}}}
      }}
    }}
   }}
  |DateFormat={{#if:{{{dateformat|}}}|{{{dateformat}}}|none}}
  |quote = {{{quote|}}}
  |Ref={{{ref|}}}
  |Sep = {{#if:{{{separator|{{{seperator|}}}}}}
          | {{#ifeq:{{{separator|{{{seperator}}}}}}|;|;|{{{separator|{{{seperator}}} }}} }}
          |.}}
  |PS={{#if:{{{quote|}}}||{{{postscript|.}}}}}
  |OriginalURL = {{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}
  |ArchiveDate= {{{archivedate|}}}
}}{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}|[[Category:Cite web templates using unusual accessdate parameters|{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template}}

</noinclude>

revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;">{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
      |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}
    }}
  |then=[[Template:Web reference|Web reference]] error: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}{{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}{{qif
  |test={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{Author|{{{author|}}}}}}
    |2={{{PublishYear|{{{publishyear|}}}}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{URL|{{{url|}}}}}}
    |2={{{Title|{{{title|}}}}}}}}
  |then= [{{{URL|{{{url}}}}}} {{{Title|{{{title}}}}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|{{{Format|}}}}}}
  |then= ({{{Format|{{{format}}}}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Work|{{{work|}}}}}}
  |then= ''{{{Work|{{{work}}}}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{Publisher|{{{publisher|}}}}}}
  |then= {{{Publisher|{{{publisher}}}}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|{{{date|}}}}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{Date|{{{date}}}}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{Year|{{{year|}}}}}}
    |then=, [[{{{Year|{{{year}}}}}}]]
  }}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.text: "{{{articletitle}}}." ''{{{worktitle}}}''. URL: [{{{URL}}} {{{URLdesc}}}]

revision.comment: Changed how the URL is displayed
Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]] [[{{{year}}}]].
add , between date and year
avoid bogus boldface if "work" is empty string
Add {{{author}}}
the period (.) is not part of the title so should be outside the quotation marks. Yes I am picky. :)
Added "Web Link" as first two words. Otherwise its not clear what kind of ref it is (books, etc are obvious)
revision.text: Web Link: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: Suddenly having my footnotes covered with "Web Link" is annoying.
revision.text: Web reference: "[{{{URL}}} {{{title}}}]"''. {{{work}}}''. Accessed on [[{{{date}}}]], [[{{{year}}}]].

revision.comment: URL accessed on....
version with optional parameter handling
format
Make Year optional because Date can contain full date
de-emphasizing date
testing to fix redundant date link mess - I'll revert if it doesn't work
added esoteric warning
eliminated space at end (moved <noinclude> one line up)
Square brackets re-introduced so that user preferences work again. Spurios comma and space removed, again user prefernces take care of it.
What do you think?
Ok, I sat the parameters right now, they should show lowercase now
reverted to my proposal, but removed unneccissary paramaters as per consensus. parameters still on 'url' because it can often include '='
ok, back with the numbers :) plus some other
back link if required params missing
line 18: indented closing "}}" by one level as this refers to "{{boolor" on line 15 (warning: cannot be seen in diff)
used new parameters "test" and "then" of {{if}} instead of "1=" and "2=" (this should have not changed the semantic of the code)
Warning: drastic change: Replaced {{if}} with new {{qif}}. I have tested that but please revert quickly if you see anything that doesn't work. Thanks!
reworked space char handling
there was one } missing
Improved date user preferences when using "date","year" variant. (Was reported by Fritz Saalfeld, see talk. See also [[User talk:Adrian Buehlmann/web reference 2005-12-02-1]])
another look
cat to "Citation templates"
Removing unneeded use of [[Template:Tl]]
added HTML cite element, no ID attribute yet (see [[template talk:Web reference#HTML cite element, anchor]])

    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}</cite><noinclude>
This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: transplant {{{author}}} handling from {{cite book}}
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif

  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif

}}{{qif

  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif

{{esoteric}}

revision.comment: Putting usage in template
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal;"><includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{boolnand
      |1={{{url|}}}
      |2={{{title|}}}
    }}
  |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified 
}}</includeonly>{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{authorlink|}}}
    |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}]]
    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}
      |then={{{last}}}{{qif
        |test={{{first|}}}
        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}
    }}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}}
  |then={{qif
    |test={{{coauthors|}}}
    |then=, {{{coauthors}}}
  }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{year|}}}
  |then= ({{{year|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{boolor
    |1={{{author|}}}
    |2={{{year|}}}}}
  |then=.}}{{qif
  |test={{booland
    |1={{{url|}}}
    |2={{{title|}}}}}
  |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}].
}}{{qif
  |test={{{format|}}}
  |then= ({{{format|}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{work|}}}
  |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif
  |test={{{publisher|}}}
  |then= {{{publisher}}}.
}}{{qif
  |test={{{accessdate|}}}  
  |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif
    |test={{{accessyear|}}}
    |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]]
  }}
}}</cite><noinclude>
This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only.

== Usage ==
 '''<nowiki>{{cite web
 | author = 
 | year = 
 | url = 
 | title = 
 | format = 
 | work = 
 | publisher = 
 | accessdate = 
 | accessyear = 
}}</nowiki>'''

=== Required parameters ===
* '''url''': URL of online item.
* '''title''': Title of online item.
* '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format.
** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used)

=== Optional parameters ===
* '''author''': Author
* '''year''': Date published.
* '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF.  HTML implied if not specified.
* '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work.
* '''publisher''': Publisher, if any.

{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: updated usage section. removed boolor call
revision.text: {{qif |test={{boolnand |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}} }} |then=Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{authorlink|}}} |then=[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }}]] |else={{qif |test={{{last|}}} |then={{{last}}}{{qif |test={{{first|}}} |then=, {{{first}}} }} |else={{{author}}} }} }} }}{{qif |test={{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} |then={{qif |test={{{coauthors|}}} |then=, {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{qif |test={{{year|}}} |then= ({{{year|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} |then=.}}{{qif |test={{booland |1={{{url|}}} |2={{{title|}}}}} |then= [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]. }}{{qif |test={{{format|}}} |then= ({{{format|}}}) }}{{qif |test={{{work|}}} |then= ''{{{work}}}''.}}{{qif |test={{{publisher|}}} |then= {{{publisher}}}. }}{{qif |test={{{accessdate|}}} |then= URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{qif |test={{{accessyear|}}} |then=, [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template is a simpler replacement for [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''year''': Date published. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == '''{{cite web | last = | first = | authorlink = | coauthors = | year = | url = | title = | format = | work = | publisher = | accessdate = | accessyear = }}''' === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: added language parameter, at least until the dust will settle on {{xx icon}}
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] {{#if: {{{language|}}}|(in {{{language}}})}}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: fixing space char bugs with new language parameters, added language to description
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: tried to bring inline with [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Embedded HTML links]]
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | ,retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage ==

| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}

HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: reinsert [[]] to conform with instructions and common usage, reinsert "" to conform with citation standards
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ([[{{{date}}}]]) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | "[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]"{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. | month =

| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =

| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}

revision.comment: oops, of course the quotes should enclose the title only, not the whole [...] tag!
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} “{{{title}}}”]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}. }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | Retrieved [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }} }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | [{{{url}}} {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{{title}}}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.}} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}|| {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | : |}}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | .}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}} [{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}|| {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | : |}}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{year|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}|| {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | : |}}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =

| accessdate =

}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. revision.comment: ...and another one. Fighting with periods can get hairy. Sigh.
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | . }} | {{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | : |}}{{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}}. | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | {{{month}}} {{{year}}}. | {{{year}}}. }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| accessyear =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: Fixed a bug with ":". This is getting nasty

{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. (Optional if ISO 8601 date used) === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

| url =

{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |accessyear= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * '''accessdate''': Date (Month Day) when item was accessed. Should be [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format (N.B. Each single digit month and day must have a "0" before it, otherwise the automatic formatting of the date according to user preferences will not work). ** '''accessyear''': Year when item was accessed. revision.comment: Usage: there is no "monthday" param in this template
revision.text:
{{ #if: {{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} |1}}}} ||Error on call to [[template:cite web]]: Parameters '''url''' and '''title''' must be specified }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}} | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }}]] | {{#if: {{{last|}}} | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }} | {{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|{{{last|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}| {{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} |}} }}{{#if: {{{last|}}}{{{author|}}} | . }}{{#if: {{{url|}}} | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (in {{{language}}}) }}.{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}} }} }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format|}}}) }}{{#if: {{{work|}}} | ''{{{work}}}''. }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} | pp. {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} | {{{publisher}}}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} | . | {{#if: {{{date|}}}{{{year|}}}{{{month|}}} | : | . }} }} }}{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} ||{{#if: {{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}). | {{#if: {{{year|}}} | {{#if: {{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}). | ({{{year}}}). }} }} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} | URL accessed on [[{{{accessdate}}}]]{{#if: {{{accessyear|}}} | , [[{{{accessyear}}}]] }}. }}{{#if: {{{accessmonthday|}}} | URL accessed on {{{accessmonthday}}}, {{{accessyear}}}. }} This template replaces deprecated [[template:web reference]]. It provides lower case parameters only. == Usage == 
{{cite web
| last =
| first =
| authorlink =
| coauthors =
| date = 
| year = 
| month =
| url =
| title =
| format =
| work =
| pages =
| publisher =
| language =
| accessdate =
| curly =
}}
{{cite web|last= |first= |authorlink= |coauthors= | date= |url= |title= |format= |work= |pages= |publisher= | language= |accessdate= |curly= }} === Required parameters === * '''url''': URL of online item. * '''title''': Title of online item. * One of the two date format parameters: ** '''accessdate''': Full date when item was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked; it will be linked automatically. ** '''accessmonthday''' and '''accessyear''': Month and day when item was accessed, e.g. May 10, and year when item was accessed, e.g. 2005. Will not be wikilinked. === Optional parameters === * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': Full date of publication, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. ''2006-02-17''. Must not be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. Must not be wikilinked. * '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: "date" may be wikilinked. That's what people are doing on the calls anyway.
revision.text:

May be wikilinked. ** OR: '''year''': Year of publication, and '''month''': Name of the month of publication. If you also have the day, use ''date'' instead. HTML implied if not specified. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''pages''': Pages, if any, especially if pdf format * '''language''': language of publication * '''curly''': uses Unicode curly quotes instead of straight quotes if non-blank __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[ja:Template:Cite web]] [[it:Template:Cita web]] [[no:Mal:Kilde www]] [[ru:Шаблон:Cite web]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích web]] [[zh:Template:Cite web]]

revision.comment: removed, I don't see any reason for their inclusion, this template is supposed to cite websites and not news
revision.text:

revision.comment: rv. Please don't do this. This makes maintenance of the calls nedlessly harder
